title: Notify if a board hasn't been used in a while
excerpt: We have over 300 boards in use with our customers which are all in use for varying amounts of time - anything from a couple of weeks to a couple of years.  In order to keep the platform tidy we need a way of being able t…

posts.author: ClareHughes (Clare Fox)
posts.cookedHtml: We have over 300 boards in use with our customers which are all in use for varying amounts of time - anything from a couple of weeks to a couple of years. In order to keep the platform tidy we need a way of being able to notify a specific person or group of users that a board hasn’t been viewed or modified for a set period of time - say 1 month.
